nasb.text: Among the sons of the priests who had married foreign wives were found of the sons of Jeshua the son of Jozadak, and his brothers: Maaseiah, Eliezer, Jarib and Gedaliah.

esv.text: Now there were found some of the sons of the priests who had married foreign women: Maaseiah, Eliezer, Jarib, and Gedaliah, some of the sons of Jeshua the son of Jozadak and his brothers.

cnv.text: 在祭司子孫中，娶了外族的女子為妻的有耶書亞的子孫，約薩達的兒子和他的兄弟瑪西雅、以利以謝、雅立、基大利。

ccb.text: 祭司中娶外族女子为妻的有耶书亚的子孙约萨达的儿子及其弟兄玛西雅、以利以谢、雅立和基大利。
